channel.title: The Dudley Blog
channel.description: Culture, archetypes, and honest app roundups from Dudley Development — the studio behind Vibe Rater and Powell Prowl.

item.title: The Funniest Photo Rating Apps in 2026, Ranked
item.description: A genuinely honest roundup of the best photo rating apps on iPhone in 2026 — what they actually do, who they're for, and which one is most likely to make you laugh at your own photo.

item.title: The Quiet Luxury Era Is Over — Here's What Actually Won
item.description: Quiet luxury peaked with Succession. By 2024, H&M was selling a 'stealth wealth capsule.' The trend cycle moved on. But the aesthetic's successor isn't what you'd expect — and the archetype remains.

item.title: In Defense of the NPC (It's a Compliment Now)
item.description: NPC started as an internet insult. It became a TikTok content genre. Now 'NPC energy' is a genuine compliment — for people who have mastered the art of not performing for anyone. We explain the full arc.

item.title: What Your Phone Case Says About Your Vibe
item.description: The phone case is the one accessory you chose while panicking about dropping your phone. What that split-second decision reveals about your archetype — according to vibe science (not real science).

item.title: What Your Federal Reserve Opinion Says About Your Vibe
item.description: Your gut reaction to a Fed rate decision reveals your archetype. We matched every possible take on monetary policy to a Vibe Rater result.

item.title: The Best Satirical iOS Games That Actually Respect Your Intelligence
item.description: Most 'funny' games on the App Store are slot machines with a hat. These six satire games on iPhone are genuinely good — including one about the Federal Reserve.

item.title: Gorpcore Prophet: The Archetype That Won the 2020s Without Trying
item.description: Gorpcore didn't go mainstream. Everyone else went gorpcore. A look at the decade's most unlikely aesthetic winner — and what separates a Gorpcore Prophet from someone who just owns a vest.
